name: @coderover/mcp
description: MCP server and installer for CodeRover graph-aware code search.

scripts.test:ts: TS_REAL=1 bash -c 'for f in test/local/ingest/chunker.spec.ts test/local/ingest/symbol-extractor.spec.ts test/local/ingest/import-extractor.spec.ts test/local/ingest/tree-sitter-walker.spec.ts test/local/ingest/grammar-loader.spec.ts test/local/ingest/e2e-corpus.spec.ts test/local/ingest/python-extractor.spec.ts test/local/ingest/go-extractor.spec.ts test/local/ingest/java-extractor.spec.ts test/local/pipeline.spec.ts test/local/watch/watch-daemon.spec.ts test/cli/local/index-cmd.spec.ts test/cli/local/reindex-cmd.spec.ts test/cli/local/watch-cmd.spec.ts; do node_modules/.bin/jest $f || exit 1; done'
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && npm test && npm run smoke:pack
scripts.bench: npm run bench:index-10k && npm run bench:query-p95 && npm run bench:reingest
